content:
@sigil v0 hybrid
G: decide(default_architecture)
C: team(6) ∧ ddl("4 months") ∧ store("PostgreSQL") ∧ traffic(modest) ∧ split(post_release) ∧ fast_ship ∧ low_ops
H: mod_monolith ⇒ prefer(default_architecture)
P: monolith → single deployable service with clear internal module boundaries
P: PostgreSQL → one shared database for first release
R: ! premature_microservices
R: ! pre_split_billing_core
A: fastest_delivery ∧ lowest_ops ∧ simplest_team_coordination ∧ easiest_post_release_split
